value.fullName: I have received the full dTpa vaccination (Diphtheria, Tetanus & Pertussis)
value.label: I have received the full dTpa vaccination (Diphtheria, Tetanus & Pertussis)

value.fullName: I’ve only been vaccinated for Pertussis (Whooping Cough)
value.label: I’ve only been vaccinated for Pertussis (Whooping Cough)

value.fullName: I have not been vaccinated yet
value.label: I have not been vaccinated yet
